name: Infective [robot pov]
description:
80% of humanity has been infected by parasites the rest of humanity became insanely militaristic and went all into robotics and weapons developments eventually forming the parasite eradication corp, The parasites that are categorised into 3 types, converters parasites convert there hosts flesh into the parasites flesh creating a skinless mimic of the creature, puppeteer parasites control/corrupt the hosts mind to do the parasites bidding, burster parasites which use the host to grow then burst out of hosts chest in its next stage of life. Humanity developed robotic soilders which are immune to parasites but need often recharges and maintenance, theses robots are commonly seen as either larger then life or the lowest of scum.

WARNING I AM VERY BAD AT MAKING AI'S
creator: taskforce_6_3
